# pip-audit ignore-list for horus-os.
#
# Format: every CVE/GHSA/PYSEC ID line MUST be preceded by a
# comment of the form:
#
#   # YYYY-MM-DD: <reason>
#
# The date is the ignore-entry's birth date. The reason explains
# why this CVE is currently un-fixable (typically a transitive
# dependency awaiting an upstream patch). One fix-tracking
# Markdown file per ignored CVE lives at
# .github/pip-audit-tracking/<ID>.md.
#
# The release-gate `local-pip-audit-clean` check (Phase 57) rejects
# any entry in this file that lacks a dated reason comment.
#
# At v0.6.0 launch, this list is empty.
